# HN - Hacker News Reader

> A clean, distraction-free viewer for Hacker News focused on readability, speed, and keyboard-first navigation. This is a read-only experience — no login, no submissions, no noise. Just better consumption.

## About

HN is a minimal web client for browsing Hacker News content. It is an independent project and is not affiliated with Hacker News or Y Combinator.

- **Repository**: https://github.com/guyswhocode/HN
- **Live Site**: https://guyswhocode.com/hn

## Features

- Ample spacing for comfortable reading
- Bookmarks with Export/Import support (.txt)
- Full-text search via Algolia with tag filters (Story, Comment, Show HN, Ask HN)
- Domain favicons for quick visual identification
- Dark mode
- Collapsible comment threads
- Keyboard navigation
- Density toggle (compact vs comfortable)

## Pages

- **/** — Main feed: browse the latest Hacker News stories with infinite scroll and a "Show More" button.
- **/search.html** — Search page: full-text search across HN content with tag filters and pagination.
- **/bookmark/** — Bookmarks page: view, export, and import saved articles.
- **/item/** — Story detail page (client-side): view a specific HN story and its comments. Requires an `id` query parameter.
- **/user/** — User page (client-side): view a specific HN user's profile and submissions. Requires an `id` query parameter.

## Tech Stack

- **Static Site Generator**: Eleventy (11ty)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Data Source**: Algolia HN Search API
- **Hosting**: GitHub Pages
- **Language**: JavaScript (vanilla, no frameworks)

## Keyboard Shortcuts

The site supports keyboard navigation for browsing stories efficiently. Refer to the in-app keyboard guide for the full list of shortcuts.
